description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, metallic head and a wooden handle. The axe head is broad with a single, sharply angled cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. The handle is made of wood, slightly curved for ergonomic grip, and tapers towards the end for better control. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with a visible collar or socket that envelops the top of the handle. The metallic blade has a matte, slightly reflective finish, while the wooden handle displays a natural grain texture. No visible markings or branding are present on either the blade or the handle.
description: A hand axe with a broad metal blade and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping tasks. The blade is matte gray, and the handle shows natural wood grain.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the blade, showing the octagonal shape of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the left side, clearly displaying the wide, single-edged blade and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the bottom of the handle, highlighting the symmetry of the handle and the thickness of the head.
description_view_3: The axe is viewed from the right side, showing the blade's profile and the handle's curvature, mirroring the left-side view.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded end, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and visible wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad blade with a straight edge and a flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade socket enveloping the top of the wooden handle.
